CHAR 1 Indicates a diagnosis of pneumonia - inflammation of the lungs; most commonly of bacterial or viral origin. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
98 I2G I2G_SEPTICEMIA 26b(I2g)Septicemia CHAR 1 Indicates a diagnosis of septicemia - morbid condition associated with bacterial growth in the blood. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
99 J1C J1C_DEHYDRATED 27a(J1c)Dehydrated - Output Exceeds Input CHAR 1 Indicates the patient is dehydrated - output excees input. 0 = Unchecked, 1 =
